title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXVIII. Relics.
content:
Come, let's to bed,
        Says Sleepy-head;
            Tarry a while, says Slow:
        Put on the pot,
        Says Greedy-gut,
            Let's sup before we go.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DCXXVIII. Relics.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
